title: Psionic & Psychic Abilities
summary: The reawakening powers — fifteen sessions of psionic protocols, enhancements, and the claim that the abilities were always there.
markdown:
**Psionic abilities** are the record's promise to the individual: the latent powers —
[telepathy](/lore/telepathy/), clairvoyance, remote perception, manifestation — that the
sessions treat not as gifts to be granted but as functions to be *switched back on*.
Fifteen sessions carry the vocabulary from 2020 through 2025.

The teaching pairs the powers with their activation method: *"Believe in yourself.
Practice. Psionic ability protocol from the entity Kosol"* (April 2020) — the
[belief protocol](/lore/belief-protocol/) as ignition. The upgrades administered
in-session name them as targets: *"Enhancement of your psionic functions. Brain activity
enhancement of (your) Cakra & Neu[ronet]..."* And the forecast globalizes them: *"psychic
development, psionic abilities, will be enhanced within all of your cultural systems"* —
the coming era, in the record's telling, is a psychic one by default.

The community's own training (the [super soldier](/lore/super-soldiers/) curriculum, the
[meditation practice](/lore/meditation-trance/), the [Q Devices](/lore/q-devices/))
is the delivery system for exactly this: the archive's practice stack exists to make
psionics ordinary.
